case_title: JAIME MCBROOM VS. YOUNG MEN'S CHRISTIAN ASSOCIATION OF SAN FRANCISCO ET A

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-24-2015 CONTINUED TO AUG-05-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF JAIME MCBROOM IN RESPONSE TO OSC FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCBROOM, JAIME

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCBROOM, JAIME AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG MEN'S CHRISTIAN ASSOCIATION OF SAN FRANCISCO DBA YMCA OF SAN FRANCISCO DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-24-2015 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-24-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-01-2015

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-15-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-05-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-15-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
